title: Light Fingers
description: Raven, a contact for the Thieves Guild, wants to see if you have what it takes. Steal the merchant Horace's ledger from his shop in Dalhurst without getting caught.

objectives.description: Steal Horace's ledger from his shop

notes: First quest in Thieves Guild chain. Tests basic theft skills. Merchant shop should be in Dalhurst market district.
